root@demo-so-so-mariadb-config-job-wch7z:/tmp# cat test.sh
#!/bin/bash

mysql() {
    /usr/bin/mysql  -h $DB_HOST -P $DB_PORT "$@"
}
export -f mysql
#alias mysql='mysql -h $DB_HOST -P $DB_PORT'
for f in /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/*; do
  case "$f" in
  *.sh)     echo "$0: running $f"; . "$f" ;;
  *.sql)    echo "$0: running $f"; "${mysql[@]}" < "$f"; echo ;;
  *.sql.gz) echo "$0: running $f"; gunzip -c "$f" | "${mysql[@]}"; echo ;;
  *)        echo "$0: ignoring $f" ;;
  esac
  echo
done
